entities.name: Decisive Verbs
entities.context: Category of action verbs (finalize, confirm, approve, commit, launch) used for direct CTAs in communications

entities.name: Direct CTAs
entities.context: Calls-to-action that are clear and action-oriented in messaging

entities.name: Double-Check Language
entities.context: Communication framework for phrasing when uncertainty exists (missing links, unspecified dates, no explicit CTA)

entities.name: Max CTAs Per Message
entities.context: Writing rule limiting calls-to-action to 2 per message

relationships.context: Decisive verbs are the recommended vocabulary for creating direct CTAs
Double-check language provides softer alternatives when direct CTAs are not appropriate
